---
title: "Dependency Injection"
format: html
---

# Dependency Injection граф

Структура зависимостей через Dagger Hilt.

## Hilt Dependency Graph

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-01
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 1"
graph TB
    subgraph "Application Scope"
        App[JabookApplication<br/>@HiltAndroidApp]
        
        subgraph "Singleton Dependencies"
            DB[(Room Database)]
            DS[(DataStore)]
            HTTP[OkHttp Client]
            Retrofit[Retrofit]
            ExoPlayer[ExoPlayer]
            Torrent[TorrentManager]
        end
    end
    
    subgraph "Activity Scope"
        Activity[ComposeMainActivity<br/>@AndroidEntryPoint]
    end
    
    subgraph "ViewModel Scope"
        LibVM[LibraryViewModel<br/>@HiltViewModel]
        PlayerVM[PlayerViewModel<br/>@HiltViewModel]
        DownloadsVM[DownloadViewModel<br/>@HiltViewModel]
        SearchVM[SearchViewModel<br/>@HiltViewModel]
        SettingsVM[SettingsViewModel<br/>@HiltViewModel]
    end
    
    subgraph "Service Scope"
        AudioService[AudioPlayerService<br/>@AndroidEntryPoint]
        DownloadService[DownloadForegroundService<br/>@AndroidEntryPoint]
    end
    
    subgraph "Worker Scope"
        DownloadWorker[DownloadWorker<br/>@HiltWorker]
        SyncWorker[SyncWorker<br/>@HiltWorker]
    end
    
    subgraph "Repository Layer"
        BooksRepo[BooksRepository]
        AuthRepo[AuthRepository]
        DownloadRepo[DownloadRepository]
        PrefsRepo[UserPreferencesRepository]
    end
    
    %% Application provides Singletons
    App -.provides.-> DB
    App -.provides.-> DS
    App -.provides.-> HTTP
    App -.provides.-> Retrofit
    App -.provides.-> ExoPlayer
    App -.provides.-> Torrent
    
    %% Repositories depend on Singletons
    BooksRepo -.@Inject.-> DB
    AuthRepo -.@Inject.-> DS
    AuthRepo -.@Inject.-> Retrofit
    DownloadRepo -.@Inject.-> Torrent
    PrefsRepo -.@Inject.-> DS
    
    %% ViewModels depend on Repositories
    LibVM -.@Inject.-> BooksRepo
    LibVM -.@Inject.-> PrefsRepo
    PlayerVM -.@Inject.-> AudioService
    DownloadsVM -.@Inject.-> DownloadRepo
    SearchVM -.@Inject.-> BooksRepo
    SettingsVM -.@Inject.-> PrefsRepo
    
    %% Services depend on Singletons
    AudioService -.@Inject.-> ExoPlayer
    AudioService -.@Inject.-> DB
    DownloadService -.@Inject.-> Torrent
    
    %% Workers depend on Repositories
    DownloadWorker -.@Inject.-> DownloadRepo
    SyncWorker -.@Inject.-> BooksRepo
    
    style App fill:#e1f5ff
    style DB fill:#fff3e0
    style ExoPlayer fill:#f3e5f5
    style Torrent fill:#e8f5e9
```

## Hilt Modules

### 1. NetworkModule

```kotlin
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object NetworkModule {
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideCache(@ApplicationContext context: Context): Cache {
        return Cache(
            directory = File(context.cacheDir, "http_cache"),
            maxSize = 50L * 1024 * 1024 // 50 MB
        )
    }
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideOkHttpClient(cache: Cache): OkHttpClient {
        return OkHttpClient.Builder()
            .cache(cache)
            .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
            .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
            .build()
    }
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideRetrofit(okHttpClient: OkHttpClient): Retrofit {
        return Retrofit.Builder()
            .baseUrl("https://rutracker.org/")
            .client(okHttpClient)
            .addConverterFactory(GsonConverterFactory.create())
            .build()
    }
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideRutrackerApi(retrofit: Retrofit): RutrackerApiService {
        return retrofit.create(RutrackerApiService::class.java)
    }
}
```

### 2. DatabaseModule

```kotlin
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object DatabaseModule {
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideDatabase(
        @ApplicationContext context: Context
    ): AudioDatabase {
        return Room.databaseBuilder(
            context,
            AudioDatabase::class.java,
            "audio_database"
        )
        .fallbackToDestructiveMigration()
        .build()
    }
    
    @Provides
    fun provideBooksDao(database: AudioDatabase): BooksDao {
        return database.booksDao()
    }
    
    @Provides
    fun providePlaylistDao(database: AudioDatabase): PlaylistDao {
        return database.playlistDao()
    }
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideDataStore(
        @ApplicationContext context: Context
    ): DataStore<Preferences> {
        return context.createDataStore("user_preferences")
    }
}
```

### 3. MediaModule

```kotlin
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object MediaModule {
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideExoPlayer(
        @ApplicationContext context: Context,
        loadControl: LoadControl,
        audioAttributes: AudioAttributes
    ): ExoPlayer {
        return ExoPlayer.Builder(context)
            .setLoadControl(loadControl)
            .setAudioAttributes(audioAttributes, true)
            .setHandleAudioBecomingNoisy(true)
            .setWakeMode(C.WAKE_MODE_NETWORK)
            .build()
    }
    
    @Provides
    fun provideLoadControl(): LoadControl {
        return DefaultLoadControl.Builder()
            .setBufferDurationsMs(
                minBufferMs = 15000,
                maxBufferMs = 50000,
                bufferForPlaybackMs = 2500,
                bufferForPlaybackAfterRebufferMs = 5000
            )
            .build()
    }
    
    @Provides
    fun provideAudioAttributes(): AudioAttributes {
        return AudioAttributes.Builder()
            .setContentType(C.AUDIO_CONTENT_TYPE_MUSIC)
            .setUsage(C.USAGE_MEDIA)
            .build()
    }
}
```

### 4. DataModule

```kotlin
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
abstract class DataModule {
    
    @Binds
    abstract fun bindBooksRepository(
        impl: OfflineFirstBooksRepository
    ): BooksRepository
    
    @Binds
    abstract fun bindAuthRepository(
        impl: AuthRepositoryImpl
    ): AuthRepository
    
    @Binds
    abstract fun bindUserPreferencesRepository(
        impl: DataStoreUserPreferencesRepository
    ): UserPreferencesRepository
    
    @Binds
    abstract fun bindSleepTimerRepository(
        impl: SleepTimerRepositoryImpl
    ): SleepTimerRepository
}
```

### 5. DownloadModule

```kotlin
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object DownloadModule {
    
    @Provides
    @Singleton
    fun provideTorrentManager(
        @ApplicationContext context: Context
    ): TorrentManager {
        return TorrentManager(context)
    }
    
    @Provides
    fun provideDownloadQueueManager(
        torrentManager: TorrentManager,
        database: AudioDatabase
    ): DownloadQueueManager {
        return DownloadQueueManager(torrentManager, database)
    }
    
    @Binds
    abstract fun bindDownloadRepository(
        impl: WorkManagerDownloadRepository
    ): DownloadRepository
}
```

## Dependency Flow (ERD-style)

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-02
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 2"
erDiagram
    APPLICATION ||--o{ SINGLETON : provides
    SINGLETON ||--o{ REPOSITORY : injects
    REPOSITORY ||--o{ VIEWMODEL : injects
    REPOSITORY ||--o{ SERVICE : injects
    REPOSITORY ||--o{ WORKER : injects
    
    APPLICATION {
        component HiltAndroidApp
        scope SingletonComponent
    }
    
    SINGLETON {
        database RoomDatabase
        datastore DataStore
        http OkHttpClient
        api Retrofit
        player ExoPlayer
        torrent TorrentManager
    }
    
    REPOSITORY {
        interface BooksRepository
        interface AuthRepository
        interface DownloadRepository
        interface UserPreferencesRepository
    }
    
    VIEWMODEL {
        class LibraryViewModel
        class PlayerViewModel
        class DownloadViewModel
        class SearchViewModel
        class SettingsViewModel
    }
    
    SERVICE {
        class AudioPlayerService
        class DownloadForegroundService
    }
    
    WORKER {
        class DownloadWorker
        class SyncWorker
    }
```

## Scopes Hierarchy

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-03
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 3"
graph TD
    AppScope[Application Scope<br/>@Singleton]
    
    AppScope --> ActivityScope[Activity Scope<br/>@ActivityScoped]
    AppScope --> ServiceScope[Service Scope<br/>@ServiceScoped]
    AppScope --> WorkerScope[Worker Scope<br/>@WorkerScoped]
    
    ActivityScope --> VMScope[ViewModel Scope<br/>@ViewModelScoped]
    
    AppScope -.provides.-> DB[(Database)]
    AppScope -.provides.-> Network[Network]
    AppScope -.provides.-> Player[ExoPlayer]
    
    VMScope -.uses.-> DB
    VMScope -.uses.-> Network
    
    ServiceScope -.uses.-> Player
    ServiceScope -.uses.-> DB
    
    WorkerScope -.uses.-> DB
    WorkerScope -.uses.-> Network
    
    style AppScope fill:#e1f5ff
    style VMScope fill:#fff3e0
    style ServiceScope fill:#f3e5f5
    style WorkerScope fill:#e8f5e9
```

## Injection Types

### Constructor Injection

```kotlin
@HiltViewModel
class LibraryViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val booksRepository: BooksRepository,
    private val preferencesRepository: UserPreferencesRepository
) : ViewModel()
```

### Field Injection

```kotlin
@AndroidEntryPoint
class AudioPlayerService : MediaLibraryService() {
    @Inject lateinit var exoPlayer: ExoPlayer
    @Inject lateinit var database: AudioDatabase
}
```

### Assisted Injection (Workers)

```kotlin
@HiltWorker
class DownloadWorker @AssistedInject constructor(
    @Assisted context: Context,
    @Assisted params: WorkerParameters,
    private val torrentManager: TorrentManager
) : CoroutineWorker(context, params)
```
